customer.name: 永绅 yoyoosun 客户配置包

sales_order_acceptance.guardrail: Controlled runtime loader ready: sales_order_acceptance may submit the sales order source document, then create the configured approval, engineering-data and PMC review tasks; it does not post inventory, shipment, quality or finance facts.

fact_command_contract.idempotency_boundary: purchase receipt no and source line uniqueness exist; future runtime command must still provide process idempotency key
gate evaluation never decides line inspections or writes domain facts; ProcessRuntime still requires active node, expected version and idempotency key
purchase receipt posting replay keeps one inbound inventory transaction; future runtime command must still provide process idempotency key

material_supply.guardrail: Runtime loader ready: material_supply can construct purchase_order process instances with explicit domain_command nodes; incoming_qc only aggregates formal line decisions, and Workflow task completion still cannot create purchase_receipts, decide quality_inspections or post inventory_txns.

fact_command_contract.domain_usecase_binding: process_runtime_handler: InventoryUsecase.PassQualityInspection / RejectQualityInspection for source_type=SHIPMENT quality_inspection
fact_command_contract.idempotency_boundary: ExecuteDomainCommandNode requires active node, expected_version and idempotency key; handler rejects mismatched shipment / inspection refs

fact_command_contract.domain_usecase_binding: process_runtime_handler: OperationalFactUsecase.GetShipment validates draft shipment finance release gate without shipping inventory or creating finance facts
fact_command_contract.idempotency_boundary: ProcessRuntime domain command carries process idempotency key and keeps finance release separate from shipment.ship
ExecuteDomainCommandNode requires active node, expected_version and idempotency key; after success the node is completed so duplicate calls cannot re-enter shipment.ship

fact_command_contract.domain_usecase_binding: process_runtime_handler: OperationalFactUsecase.CreateFinanceFactDraft for RECEIVABLE from SHIPPED shipment
fact_command_contract.idempotency_boundary: ExecuteDomainCommandNode requires active node, expected_version and idempotency key; finance fact draft uses the same process idempotency key

finished_goods_delivery.guardrail: Start-only loader: finished_goods_delivery can create and start a ProcessInstance; finished_goods_quality, shipment_finance_release, shipment_execution, and receivable_lead now have explicit handlers, and target evidence is still required before release readiness.

business_flows.label: 销售到生产
business_flows.guardrail: 销售订单提交后只形成生产评审线索；真实生产事实仍由 OperationalFactUsecase 承接。

business_flows.label: 采购到库存
business_flows.guardrail: 采购承诺、到货协同和库存入账分开；只有采购入库事实 usecase 可写库存。

business_flows.label: 生产到库存
business_flows.guardrail: 生产完工协同不等于成品入库；质检和入库事实必须走对应 usecase。

business_flows.label: 交付到结算
business_flows.guardrail: 出货单 SHIPPED 后才可评审应收 / 开票线索；出货放行不等于 shipped。

state_machines.label: 销售订单生命周期
state_machines.guardrail: 状态机只用于配置预览，不覆盖销售订单 usecase 当前状态规则。

state_machines.label: 生产任务生命周期
state_machines.guardrail: 生产状态预览不生成库存、质检或出货事实。

state_machines.label: 采购订单生命周期
state_machines.guardrail: 采购订单生命周期不替代采购入库、退货、调整或库存事实状态。

process_policies.label: 跳过策略
process_policies.guardrail: 跳过只能进入人工评审，不允许绕过后端状态、权限或事实校验。

process_policies.label: 自动生成策略
process_policies.guardrail: 自动生成只预览协同任务结构，不自动生成事实单据或库存流水。

process_policies.label: 关闭策略
process_policies.guardrail: 关闭策略不能把 task done 写成 fact posted，也不能绕过冲正 / 取消规则。

templates.guardrail: 仅作为 yoyoosun 客户配置草案里的采购合同买方抬头默认值，不进入 Product Core 默认样例，不自动生成签章、签收、采购事实或财务事实。
仅作为 yoyoosun 客户配置草案里的加工合同委托方抬头默认值，不进入 Product Core 默认样例，不自动生成签章、签收、委外事实或财务事实。

printTemplateDefaults.guardrail: Customer package print defaults provide customer-specific buyer party display defaults through the reviewed customer_config effective session projection; supplier snapshots still come from business records.

identity.label: 永绅 yoyoosun 客户配置包

workflows.label: 销售订单审批
workflows.guardrail: 销售订单审批只表达协同流转；工程资料补齐只维护产品、工序和 BOM 资料，不生成出货、库存、生产、成本、应收或发票事实。

workflows.label: 采购订单评审
workflows.guardrail: 采购订单评审不等于采购入库，不写 purchase_receipts、inventory_txns 或应付事实。

workflows.label: 付款放行
workflows.guardrail: 付款放行只作为候选协同结构，不生成付款、应付冲销、发票或总账事实。

workflows.label: 成品质检到出货结算
workflows.guardrail: 成品质检、财务放行、实际出货和应收线索必须分开；当前仅作为合同预检结构，不自动写质检、出货、库存、应收或开票事实。

businessFlows.label: 销售到生产
businessFlows.guardrail: 销售订单提交后只形成生产评审线索；真实生产事实仍由 OperationalFactUsecase 承接。

businessFlows.label: 采购到库存
businessFlows.guardrail: 采购承诺、到货协同和库存入账分开；只有采购入库事实 usecase 可写库存。

businessFlows.label: 生产到库存
businessFlows.guardrail: 生产完工协同不等于成品入库；质检和入库事实必须走对应 usecase。

businessFlows.label: 交付到结算
businessFlows.guardrail: 出货单 SHIPPED 后才可评审应收 / 开票线索；出货放行不等于 shipped。

stateMachines.label: 销售订单生命周期
stateMachines.guardrail: 状态机只用于配置预览，不覆盖销售订单 usecase 当前状态规则。

stateMachines.label: 生产任务生命周期

processPolicies.guardrail: 跳过只能进入人工评审，不允许绕过后端状态、权限或事实校验。

processPolicies.label: 自动生成策略
